endpoints.name: GET /fact
endpoints.description: Get a Fact belonging to the id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{FUNGENERATORS_API_KEY}} with your FUNGENERATORS API KEY.

endpoints.name: PUT /fact
endpoints.description: Add a Fact entry to the database (private collection).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{FUNGENERATORS_API_KEY}} with your FUNGENERATORS API KEY.

endpoints.name: DELETE /fact
endpoints.description: Delete a Fact entry identified by the id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{FUNGENERATORS_API_KEY}} with your FUNGENERATORS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /fact/categories
endpoints.notes: Replace {{FUNGENERATORS_API_KEY}} with your FUNGENERATORS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /fact/fod
endpoints.description: Get fact of the day for the given category.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{FUNGENERATORS_API_KEY}} with your FUNGENERATORS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /fact/fod/categories
endpoints.description: Get the list of supported fact of the day categories.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{FUNGENERATORS_API_KEY}} with your FUNGENERATORS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /fact/numbers
endpoints.description: Get a random fact about a number
endpoints.notes: Replace {{FUNGENERATORS_API_KEY}} with your FUNGENERATORS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /fact/onthisday/born
endpoints.description: Returns a random ( famous/ relatively famous ) person born on a given day and month
endpoints.notes: Replace {{FUNGENERATORS_API_KEY}} with your FUNGENERATORS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /fact/onthisday/died
endpoints.description: Returns a random ( famous/ relatively famous ) person died on a given day and month
endpoints.notes: Replace {{FUNGENERATORS_API_KEY}} with your FUNGENERATORS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /fact/onthisday/event
endpoints.description: Returns a random ( famous/ relatively famous ) historic event on a given day and month
endpoints.notes: Replace {{FUNGENERATORS_API_KEY}} with your FUNGENERATORS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /fact/random
endpoints.description: Get a random Fact for a given category(optional) and subcategory(optional).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{FUNGENERATORS_API_KEY}} with your FUNGENERATORS API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /fact/search
endpoints.description: Search for random Fact which has the text in the query, for a given category(optional) and subcategory(optional).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{FUNGENERATORS_API_KEY}} with your FUNGENERATORS API KEY.
